sha_binding.verified_source_note: Implementation commit: cooperative-yield helpers + applied to SGO pairing (sgo-fetcher) and offer normalization (ingest-league); phase-level timing in run details; 6 focused tests; package test-script wiring; lane sync metadata. The following commit touches only docs/06_status/proof + docs/06_status/lanes paths; merge SHA binds at close.

pnpm_verify.note: Result recorded in verification.md. Static checks (lint/type-check/build) + in-memory suites; DB-backed smoke tests run against live Supabase (recovered now that UTV2-1282 removed the overlapping-cycle DB load).

focused_lane_tests.decisive_case: a timer-based abort (same mechanism as the 240s per-league timeout) interrupts a 200k-item cooperative transform mid-flight (processes far fewer than all items); a blocking map would run to completion before the timer could fire.

runtime_proof.note: Live Supabase smoke; TAP summary embedded in verification.md. No ingestion rows written by this lane.

live_production_proof.reason: Only deployed runtime can prove: MLB cycle succeeds or fails closed within the 240s bound (no cycle running past timeout); fresh provider_offer_history rows persist incl. provider_participant_id; results ingest reached; funnel moves past ingestion or reports the next blocker. Phase timings visible in system_runs.details post-deploy.
